name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, retail merchandise sales, and precious metals buying at their Las Vegas location on E. Charleston Boulevard.
description_long:
EZPAWN operates as a traditional pawn shop with a physical location at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard in Las Vegas, Nevada. The company provides collateral-based lending services where customers can pawn items in working condition to receive immediate cash loans. The business model centers on accepting valuable items as security for short-term loans while also buying outright and reselling pre-owned merchandise.

The store offers a diverse range of services including pawn loans on general merchandise, specialized lending on firearms at select locations, gold and diamond jewelry buying, and retail sales of pre-owned brand-name items at 25-70% discounts off retail prices. They provide an online instant quote tool for electronics, layaway options with 10% down payments, and flexible "Take Today" payment plans through third-party financing partners. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to earn points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions, with online payment capabilities available in most states.

EZPAWN differentiates itself through several operational features: their Instant Quote online tool for electronics valuation, a Jewelry VIP Program offering guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits, product protection plans for electronics and jewelry purchases, and daily inventory rotation. The store maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays/Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) and explicitly emphasizes expert evaluation of items, particularly firearms and precious metals, with on-site secure storage for firearms.

As a pawn shop, EZPAWN serves customers needing immediate cash against collateral but should be understood as a high-cost borrowing option. Pawn loans come with unspecified fees and terms, and redemption timelines are not detailed on the website. The service is best suited for customers with items of value who need emergency cash and understand they may lose their collateral if unable to repay. Online payment restrictions in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania limit service accessibility for some customers.
pros: Instant Quote online tool provides same-day electronic item valuations without store visit
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up values on future purchases
Daily inventory rotation with 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics, tools, and gaming equipment
Expert on-site evaluation and secure storage for firearms with specialized lending terms
EZ+ Rewards Program earns points across pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays/Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) for accessibility
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party "Take Today" financing up to 12 months
cons: Pawn loan terms, fees, and redemption timelines are not disclosed on the website, creating transparency gaps
Online payment functionality unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania, limiting service access
Firearm loan amounts and terms are discretionary by location with no published rates or standards
Gold and jewelry buying prices stated as "fair and accurate" but no price-matching or rate transparency provided
Product and jewelry protection plans represent additional costs with unclear coverage details
best_for: Customers with valuable items (electronics, jewelry, firearms, tools) needing immediate emergency cash
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking heavily discounted pre-owned brand-name merchandise (25-70% off retail)
Jewelry owners seeking to sell or pawn pieces with guaranteed loan amounts through VIP Program enrollment
Firearm owners with collateral value looking for specialized pawn lending with secure on-site storage
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for individuals with valuable collateral who need immediate cash and can afford to lose their items if unable to repay within the loan term. The primary caveat is that specific fees, interest rates, and redemption timelines are not published on the website, making cost comparison difficult—customers must visit the store or call (702-383-0988) for transparent pricing before committing to a pawn loan.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition with cash disbursement
Firearm pawn loans and firearm purchasing at select locations
Gold and diamond jewelry buying and appraisal services
Retail sale of pre-owned brand-name electronics, tools, gaming, and merchandise
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Layaway payment option with 10% down and monthly installments
Take Today flexible payment plans (third-party financing, up to 12 months)
EZ+ Rewards Program with point accumulation and online payment processing
Product Protection Plans for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and lifetime enrollment options
Online shop with daily inventory updates and deal browsing
Free jewelry cleaning and free freestone replacement (Jewelry VIP members)
